competition.name: Ohio Regional Bluegrass Competition
competition.notes: First competition entry for the Ramblers. Gerald's first year as student director. 5th place - respectable for debut. Identified need to strengthen vocal section and tighten ensemble transitions. Set the baseline for the program.

adjudicatorFeedback.feedback: Good overall. Fiddle section occasionally drifts in extended passages.
Rhythm section solid. Vocals need stronger stack harmony.
Student director shows natural leadership instincts.

competition.name: Ohio Regional Bluegrass Competition
competition.notes: Improved by one position from 2023. Gerald introduced first original composition (Columbus Reel No. 1 - co-written with Mr. Crawford) to competition circuit. Adjudicators responded well to original material. Identified need for more complex ensemble arrangement and stronger solo showcase piece.

adjudicatorFeedback.feedback: Columbus Reel No. 1 standout. Original material distinguishes the ensemble.
Work on dynamic range - more contrast needed for top-three placement.

competition.name: Ohio Regional Bluegrass Competition
competition.notes: Best finish in program history - 2nd place. Gerald's original composition 'Harlan County Homecoming' received highest adjudicator score for the original piece category. Old Crow Waltz arrangement highlighted the vocal section's growth over three years. Narrowly missed 1st place - adjudicators noted pacing in the final piece. Targeting 1st at State 2027.

adjudicatorFeedback.feedback: Harlan County Homecoming exceptional. Personal and technically accomplished.
Four-part stack in Old Crow Waltz best heard in competition today.
Slight rush in Old Crow Waltz final 32 bars. One point separated 1st and 2nd.
Student director commands the ensemble with quiet authority. Notable.

competition.name: Ohio State Fiddle Championship
competition.category: High School Ensemble - Open Bluegrass; Solo Fiddle - Open
competition.travelNotes: Gerald driving with Mr. Crawford in Camry. Departure 6:00 AM. Load-in at Lakemont PAC by 8:30 AM. Solo check-in 9:00 AM. Ensemble performance slot: afternoon. Solo performance: TBD based on draw.

piece.title: Old Crow Waltz
piece.notes: Vocal showcase - fix pacing from regionals

piece.title: Grandpa Walter's Tune
piece.notes: Emotional close. Most personal piece. Win or lose, this ends it right.

soloEntry.notes: Solo entry separate from ensemble. Prepared with Mr. Crawford monthly sessions.

competition.notes: CRITICAL EVENT. State championship at Lakemont College - same venue as the June 5 audition. Gerald will use this as a site visit for the Lakemont campus. Do not disclose the Lakemont audition connection to Bob or Karen. This is also the last major performance before graduation May 29.

festival.name: Appalachian Strings Festival
festival.notes: Featured performance. Not judged but high-visibility. Good exposure for Ramblers brand in Columbus bluegrass community.

festival.name: Columbus Arts Festival
festival.notes: Largest public audience of the year. Ramblers performed two sets. Strong response. Good community visibility for school program.

festival.name: Appalachian Strings Festival
festival.notes: Returning performers. Scheduled. Gerald considering performing 'Grandpa Walter's Tune' as preview before State Championship.

festival.name: Columbus Arts Festival
festival.notes: Consecutive weekend with Appalachian Strings - two high-visibility pre-championship performances. Good momentum builder.

composition.title: Harlan County Homecoming
composition.notes: Most competition-tested original. Opened at Regionals 2025. Adjudicators responded strongly. Personal heritage theme.

composition.title: Columbus Reel No. 2
composition.notes: Successor to Columbus Reel No. 1. Faster. More technically demanding. Planned for State 2027 as technique showcase.

composition.title: Grandpa Walter's Tune
composition.notatedIn: notation software + iPhone Notes app (early drafts)
composition.notes: Most personal composition. Written after a Sunday video call with Grandpa Walter in Harlan County. Planned as the closing piece at State Championship and as the centerpiece of the Lakemont College audition. Not yet publicly performed as a full solo. Premieres at State May 8, 2027.

composition.title: Scioto Sunday
composition.notes: Co-written with Mr. Crawford. First public performance at Fall 2025 community festival.
